title: Arvind Kejriwal reaches Delhi HC to argue recusal of Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma: LIVE UPDATES
description: The Delhi High Court is hearing the CBI's plea challenging the discharge of Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) leader and former Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal and other accused from the Delhi excise policy case. Notably, Kejriwal has filed an application calling for the recusal of Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma from the case. Kejriwal has requested her not to hear the matter. Kejriwal and his wife Sunita Kejriwal have reached the Court. Track this page for live updates. Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) Arvind Kejriwal a
